records.m_Talk_ENG: Impressive. To think you destroyed weapons replicated by the mirror.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Impressive. To think you destroyed weapons replicated by the mirror.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Impressive. To think you destroyed weapons replicated by the mirror.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. Last time we fought, it felt like I was being overwhelmed by my own sword in your hands...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. Last time we fought, it felt like I was being overwhelmed by my own sword in your hands...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. Last time we fought, it felt like I was being overwhelmed by my own sword in your hands...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But this time, I saw an opening.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But this time, I saw an opening.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But this time, I saw an opening.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even for a master of imitation, instantly copying techniques you've never seen before must be difficult.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even for a master of imitation, instantly copying techniques you've never seen before must be difficult.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even for a master of imitation, instantly copying techniques you've never seen before must be difficult.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Especially since this time, you wouldn't even have had the chance to study her in advance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Especially since this time, you wouldn't even have had the chance to study her in advance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Especially since this time, you wouldn't even have had the chance to study her in advance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought you just copied everything easily. Turns out you're actually the hardworking type?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought you just copied everything easily. Turns out you're actually the hardworking type?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought you just copied everything easily. Turns out you're actually the hardworking type?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're strong. And you're not even fighting at full strength.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're strong. And you're not even fighting at full strength.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're strong. And you're not even fighting at full strength.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That means you still have enough left to face someone stronger than me. That's good enough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That means you still have enough left to face someone stronger than me. That's good enough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That means you still have enough left to face someone stronger than me. That's good enough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then since we won, we'll be taking the mirror.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then since we won, we'll be taking the mirror.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then since we won, we'll be taking the mirror.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That won't be of any use.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That won't be of any use.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That won't be of any use.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...What? What do you mean it won't be of any use?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...What? What do you mean it won't be of any use?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...What? What do you mean it won't be of any use?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The mirror you've encountered so far is only an imitation of Panorama. It will disappear before it can even function properly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The mirror you've encountered so far is only an imitation of Panorama. It will disappear before it can even function properly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The mirror you've encountered so far is only an imitation of Panorama. It will disappear before it can even function properly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-wait, this mirror was just a mirror reflected in another mirror? That's possible?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-wait, this mirror was just a mirror reflected in another mirror? That's possible?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-wait, this mirror was just a mirror reflected in another mirror? That's possible?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...The real Panorama is stored in a dimensional pocket inside the ship.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The real Panorama is stored in a dimensional pocket inside the ship.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The real Panorama is stored in a dimensional pocket inside the ship.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But be careful. That subspace is part of Thagirion's domain, so even I don't know what dangers might be lurking there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But be careful. That subspace is part of Thagirion's domain, so even I don't know what dangers might be lurking there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But be careful. That subspace is part of Thagirion's domain, so even I don't know what dangers might be lurking there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An Apostle of the Demon Lord who doesn't know what's inside a space created by her own master.

records.m_Talk_FRA: An Apostle of the Demon Lord who doesn't know what's inside a space created by her own master.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So even after turning you into an Apostle, she never trusted you from the start.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So even after turning you into an Apostle, she never trusted you from the start.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So even after turning you into an Apostle, she never trusted you from the start.

records.m_Talk_DEU: From the moment my heart was taken... I was only ever meant to be used and discarded.
records.m_Talk_FRA: From the moment my heart was taken... I was only ever meant to be used and discarded.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if Thagirion prepared a trap, we have no intention of backing down here.

records.m_Talk_FRA: This all started because we intended to settle things with Thagirion in the first place.
